notes: WMS inventory/work-team ledger export and net-quantity coverage now has real Chrome API/UI evidence: browser creates inbound 10, outbound 4, return 1, verifies active inventory quantity 7, work-team ledger net quantity 3 and returned quantity 1, and downloads inventory summary, outbound inventory, and work-team ledger Excel files. Backend inventory export reuses active stock filters, inventory/outbound search uses SQLite-safe contains, work-team ledger list/export only count active outbound and active return orders. Full Chrome smoke is 29/29. Inventory alert / 库存预警 remains explicitly out of scope and must not be restored. Product Green remains Yellow for production DNS/reverse-proxy/certificate validation, real third-party face gateway credentials, and exhaustive historical-page CRUD/upload/download beyond current slices.
